titles.title: Come Holy Spirit, Fall Afresh on Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit, Fall afresh on me Fill me with your power Satisfy my need

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Only you can make me whole Give me strength to make me grow Come Holy Spirit Fall afresh on me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit Fall afresh on me Fill me with your power Satisfy my need

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Pour it out Lord Pour it out Lord Pour it out Your Spirit on me
